# Chapter 14: Cyber-physical systems  (~120 pp)
- 14.1 What CPS are (10) · 14.2 Sensor-actuator-network-controller architectures (15) · 14.3 Real-time and safety-critical CPS (18) · 14.4 SCADA and ICS (15) · 14.5 Industrial IoT (15) · 14.6 Cyber-physical security (Stuxnet, water-utility attacks) (20) · 14.7 Verification and validation of CPS (15) · 14.8 Failure section: the entire chapter is a failure section, with synthesis (12)
